terrain.name: Liemaeu/GDNative-linux-HeightMap
terrain.desc: This script compiles the GDNative library on GNU/Linux for the HeightMap terrain plugin by Zylann https://github.com/Zylann/godot_heightmap_plugin

terrain.name: SirNeirda/godot_procedural_infinite_world
terrain.desc: Full Godot C# example project for procedural infinite terrain generation, with randomized objects spread throughout the map, physics and day/night cycle.

terrain.name: ape1121/Godot4-3D-Smooth-Destructible-Terrain
terrain.desc: A basic demonstration of procedural smooth terrain generation in Godot 4 in 100 lines.

foliage.name: marcosbitetti/grass_plugin_4_godot
foliage.desc: A plugin to handle huge amount of grass, foliages and other vegetations for Godot Game Engine

level_tools.name: PhoenixIllusion/mesh-library-builder
level_tools.desc: This is a tool for Godot to create collision-enabled MeshLibraries for use in GridMaps using folders or zips of GLTF models.

procedural.name: sventomasek/Godot-TileMap-Procedural-Generation
procedural.desc: C# Procedural Generation with Ore, Structure, Node and Border generation. Uses randomly generated Noise textures to generate the terrain.

procedural.name: Zylann/voxelgame
procedural.desc: Voxel world prototype made with Godot Engine

procedural.name: ClarkThyLord/Voxel-Core
procedural.desc: Voxel plugin for the Godot game engine!

procedural.name: Relintai/voxelman
procedural.desc: A voxel engine for godot. I'ts a c++ engine module.

shaders.desc: A comprehensive collection of particle effects and shaders for Godot 4, designed specifically for action games

shaders.name: Bejmach/GodotShaderEffectLibrary
shaders.desc: Library with grapgic effects for godot

shaders.name: davezant/Godot-Shader-Vault
shaders.desc: A free open-source library of optimized shaders for Godot. Designed for artists and developers who want professional visual effects without complexity.

shaders.name: Lehu7682/GODOT-VFX-LIBRARY
shaders.desc: ✨ Create stunning visuals with 35+ particle effects and 17+ shaders for Godot 4, perfect for action games like Metroidvania and platformers.

shaders.desc: A collection of textures I created to be used for lensflares, lights, particles and visual effects.
